data.content: The project uses **MSTest v3** with **Microsoft.Testing.Platform (MTP)** (indicated by `TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport` in `Directory.Build.props`). Let me run just the Integration tests with the correct MTP filter syntax.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run integration tests with MTP filter

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run integration tests with MTP filter

data.reasoningText:
This is an MSTest v3 project using Microsoft.Testing.Platform (MTP) — indicated by `TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport>true` in Directory.Build.props. With MTP, the filter syntax is different from VSTest.

For MTP with MSTest, to filter by TestCategory, I need to use the appropriate filter syntax. Let me invoke the run-tests skill to handle this properly.

arguments.description: Run integration tests with MTP filter

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-0acaca798af742bf942d3ddd5a10228a && dotnet test --filter \"TestCategory=Integration\" 2>&1", "description": "Run integration tests with MTP filter", "initial_wait": 60}

toolArgs.description: Run integration tests with MTP filter
